description_long: This is a single, high-ankle boot made of dark, weathered leather with visible creases and scuff marks, indicating significant use. The boot features a lace-up design with metal eyelets, though the laces themselves are missing, and the tongue is partially exposed. The upper section is tall and slightly slouched, with the material showing signs of wear and some discoloration, especially around the toe and heel. The sole is thick, flat, and appears to be made of rubber, with dirt and grime embedded along the edges. Stitching is visible along the seams, reinforcing the structure and adding to the rugged appearance. The overall look suggests this boot is utilitarian, possibly military or workwear, and has been exposed to harsh urban environments.
description: A single, tall, weathered leather boot with a lace-up front, missing laces, and a thick, dirty rubber sole. The boot shows heavy wear and discoloration, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the tall, creased shaft, missing laces, and scuffed toe and heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open lace area, exposed tongue, and worn toe cap.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the boot's slouched upper, visible stitching, and dirty sole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the seam running up the back and the worn heel area.
